name: Spiced Apple Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp butter or margarine, room temperature (1 T)
3/4 cup apple juice, unsweetened, room temperature (1/2 C)
recipeInstructions:
If your bread machine typically uses 2 cups of flour for a loaf, use the small loaf recipe. If it uses 3 cups, use the large loaf recipe.
Follow your manufacturer's instructions for loading ingredients into the machine.
Measure all ingredients carefully.
Select the regular, rapid, or delayed-time bake cycle as directed by your manufacturer and follow their instructions for starting the machine.
High Altitude: Above 3500 feet
For a small loaf, increase apple juice by 1-2 Tbsp and decrease yeast by 1/4 - 1/2 tsp. For a large loaf, increase apple juice by 1 1/2 - 3 Tbsp and decrease yeast by 1/4 - 3/4 tsp. Continue with the above instructions as directed.
